Source: Bedrock Doc History
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/doc-history.html
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Document History for the Amazon Bedrock User Guide

**Latest documentation update:** November 26th, 2025

## Recent Changes (Latest First)

### February 27, 2026
- **Converse API support for batch inference** - You can now use the Converse API format for batch inference input data. When creating a batch inference job, set the model invocation type to Converse to use a consistent request format across models.

### February 17, 2026
- **New feature** - Added support for fine-tuning open-weight models using OpenAI-compatible APIs. You can now create, monitor, and manage reinforcement fine-tuning jobs for open-weight models through familiar OpenAI SDK endpoints, including Files API, fine-tuning jobs APIs, and inference APIs.

### December 31, 2025
- **Updated list of models supported for service tiers** - Updated list of models supported for priority and flex service tiers.

### December 18, 2025
- **New feature** - Amazon Bedrock Data Automation now supports blueprint instruction optimization for documents. Improve Data Automation custom output accuracy by providing example content assets with ground truth labels.

### December 3, 2025
- **New managed policies** - Added AmazonBedrockMantleFullAccess, AmazonBedrockMantleReadOnly, AmazonBedrockMantleInferenceAccess for Amazon Bedrock Mantle.
- **New feature** - Amazon Bedrock now supports OpenAI compatible API endpoints, including Responses API and Chat Completions API for asynchronous inference and stateful conversation management.
- **New feature** - Added reinforcement fine-tuning to improve foundation model performance through feedback signals.
- **New feature** - Added new "Reserved" service tier for Bedrock inference.

### November 26, 2025
- **New feature** - Added "Reserved" service tier for Bedrock inference.

### November 24, 2025
- **New model** - Amazon Bedrock now supports Anthropic Claude Opus 4.5.

### November 21, 2025
- **New feature** - You can now share guardrails across accounts within an AWS organization.

### November 20, 2025
- **New feature** - Amazon Bedrock Data Automation now supports synchronous invocation.

### November 19, 2025
- **Updated model support** - Custom model import now supports OpenAI GPT-OSS models.
- **Enhanced coding use case support** - Amazon Bedrock Guardrails Standard tier now provides enhanced support for coding use cases with content filters and prompt attack detection.

### November 18, 2025
- **Updated feature** - Added new service tiers priority and flex for on demand inference.
- **Region expansion** - Amazon Bedrock is now supported in Africa (Cape Town), Asia Pacific (New Zealand), Canada West (Calgary), Mexico (Central), and Middle East (Bahrain).

### October 31, 2025
- **Updated feature** - PostgreSQL text search using 'english' dictionary instead of 'simple' for Aurora Knowledge Base.

### October 30, 2025
- **Model in legacy status** - Anthropic Claude 3.7 Sonnet is now in legacy status. Migrate to Claude Sonnet 4.5 before April 28, 2026.

### October 28, 2025
- **New feature** - Stability AI outpaint and upscale services.

### October 16, 2025
- **Updated feature** - Use previously customized models as base for further customization.

### October 15, 2025
- **New model** - You can now use Anthropic Claude Haiku 4.5 with Amazon Bedrock.
- **New feature** - Access to all Amazon Bedrock foundation models is now enabled by default with the correct IAM permissions.

### October 9, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Guardrails in Asia Pacific (Bangkok, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei), Israel (Tel Aviv), Middle East (Dubai).

### October 7, 2025
- **Updated policy** - AmazonBedrockFullAccess updated for default serverless model access.

### October 3, 2025
- **Model support** - Batch inference: DeepSeek V3.1, Qwen3 variants.

### October 2, 2025
- **New model** - Cohere Embed v4.

### October 1, 2025
- **Region expansion** - US East (Ohio) and Asia Pacific (Seoul).
- **Model status** - Claude Opus 4 in legacy status (migrate before May 31, 2026).

### September 30, 2025
- **Model support** - Qwen3 models for custom model import.
- **Region expansion** - Cohere Rerank 3.5 in US East (N. Virginia).

### September 29, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Guardrails in Asia Pacific (Melbourne) with cross-region inference.
- **New model** - Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5.

### September 26, 2025
- **Region expansion** - BDA in Asia Pacific (Thailand, Taipei, Malaysia), Middle East (UAE), Israel (Tel Aviv).
- **New feature** - Bedrock Flows: trace enhancements and DoWhile loop node.

### September 18, 2025
- **New model** - Stability AI Image Services.

### September 15, 2025
- **New model** - Meta Llama 3.3 70B Instruct for fine-tuning and continued pretraining.

### September 11, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Guardrails in Asia Pacific (Jakarta).

### September 9, 2025
- **New feature** - TwelveLabs Marengo Embed 2.7 InvokeModel API support.

### September 4, 2025
- **New feature** - Bearer token type condition key with CallWithBearerToken action.

### September 2, 2025
- **New tutorial** - Mortgage flow tutorial with CloudFormation templates.

### August 27, 2025
- **New feature** - OpenAI batch API support.

### August 25, 2025
- **Region expansion** - BDA in AWS GovCloud (US-West).
- **New languages** - BDA supports Portuguese, French, Italian, Spanish, German.

### August 21, 2025
- **New feature** - Token count estimation for some models.

### August 14, 2025
- **Region expansion** - TwelveLabs Pegasus 1.2 in US East (N. Virginia) and Asia Pacific (Seoul).

### August 11, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Guardrails in US West (N. California).

### August 5, 2025
- **New models** - OpenAI gpt-oss-20b and gpt-oss-120b.
- **New feature** - Automated Reasoning checks for Guardrails.

### July 31, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Asia Pacific (Melbourne).
- **New model** - Anthropic Claude Opus 4.1.

### July 29, 2025
- **Model support** - Batch inference: US Amazon Nova Premier inference profile.

### July 28, 2025
- **Region expansion** - US West (N. California).
- **New feature** - BDA supports DOC/DOCX and H.265 file types.

### July 16, 2025
- **Region expansion** - BDA in Europe (Frankfurt, London, Ireland), Asia Pacific (Mumbai, Sydney).
- **New feature** - Import SageMaker AI-trained Amazon Nova models into Amazon Bedrock as custom models.
- **New feature** - Deploy custom models for on-demand inference.

### July 15, 2025
- **New models** - TwelveLabs Pegasus 1.2 and Marengo Embed 2.7.

### July 7, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Claude 3.7 Sonnet in AWS GovCloud (US-West).
- **New managed policies** - Added AmazonBedrockLimitedAccess and AmazonBedrockMarketplaceAccess.
- **New feature** - Amazon Bedrock now supports the creation of API keys for easy authentication.

### July 3, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Intelligent prompt routing in GovCloud regions.
- **Model support** - Meta Llama 4 Scout 17B and Llama 4 Maverick 17B for batch inference.

### July 1, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Prompt management in Europe (Milan, Spain), Asia Pacific (Hyderabad, Osaka).
- **Region expansion** - Flows in Europe (Milan, Spain), Asia Pacific (Hyderabad, Osaka).

### June 26, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Knowledge Bases in Asia Pacific (Hyderabad, Osaka), Europe (Milan, Spain).

### June 23, 2025
- **New feature** - Amazon Bedrock Guardrails supports safeguard tiers for content filters, prompt attacks, and denied topic policies.

### June 19, 2025
- **New feature (Preview)** - Inline code nodes for Bedrock Flows.
- **New feature (Preview)** - Flow executions for longer-running flows.

### May 28, 2025
- **New tutorial** - Agent creation tutorial.

### May 22, 2025
- **New models available** - You can now use Claude Sonnet 4 and Claude Opus 4 with Amazon Bedrock.

### May 19, 2025
- **New feature** - BDA custom output for videos.

### May 16, 2025
- **New feature** - BDA blueprints for videos.

### May 13, 2025
- **New feature** - Guardrails cross-region inference.

### May 12, 2025
- **Model support** - Custom model import: Qwen2, Qwen2.5, Qwen2-VL, Qwen2.5-VL.

### May 5, 2025
- **New feature** - BDA custom blueprints for audio files.

### April 28, 2025
- **New models** - Meta Llama 4 Scout 17B, Llama 4 Maverick 17B.
- **New models** - Writer Palmyra X4 and X5.

### April 25, 2025
- **New feature** - S3 image and document references with InvokeModel and Converse APIs.
- **New feature** - BDA modality routing and hyperlink support.
- **General release** - Intelligent prompt routing is now generally available with Amazon Bedrock.

### April 22, 2025
- **General release** - Intelligent prompt routing.

### April 10, 2025
- **New feature** - Knowledge Bases: user-provided metadata and hybrid search for MongoDB.

### April 9, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Custom model import in Europe (Frankfurt).

### April 8, 2025
- **New model** - Pixtral Large (25.02).

### April 7, 2025
- **New feature** - Harmful content handling options in Guardrails.

### April 4, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Batch inference: Amazon Nova models in GovCloud (US-West).

### April 2, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Batch inference: Claude 3.5 Sonnet V2, Titan Embeddings V2 regional expansion.
- **Model support** - Provisioned Throughput: Amazon Nova Canvas, 24k context windows.

### March 27, 2025
- **New feature** - OpenSearch Managed Clusters as vector store for Knowledge Bases.
- **New feature** - Flow templates for Bedrock Flows.

### March 25, 2025
- **Feature moved** - Amazon Bedrock Studio renamed to Bedrock in SageMaker Unified Studio.

### March 18, 2025
- **New feature** - IAM condition key for enforcing specific guardrails on model inference.

### March 14, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Europe (Milan) and Europe (Spain).

### March 13, 2025
- **Feature support** - Knowledge Bases cross-region inference with structured data retrieval.
- **New feature** - Configured prompt routers with intelligent prompt routing (Preview).
- **Region expansion** - Provisioned Throughput: Llama 3.2 models in US West (Oregon).

### March 12, 2025
- **Model support** - Knowledge Bases: DeepSeek-R1 and Claude 3.7 Sonnet reasoning models.

### March 10, 2025
- **New model** - DeepSeek-R1.
- **New feature** - Agent computer use tools.

### March 7, 2025
- **General release** - GraphRAG for Knowledge Bases.

### March 3, 2025
- **General release** - Amazon Bedrock Data Automation with increased accuracy.

### February 27, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Europe (Stockholm).
- **New feature** - Session management APIs for generative AI applications.

### February 24, 2025
- **New model** - Claude 3.7 Sonnet.

### February 21, 2025
- **Region expansion** - Asia Pacific (Hyderabad) and Asia Pacific (Osaka).

### January 24, 2025
- **New models** - Cohere Embed English and Multilingual.

### January 23, 2025
- **New model** - Luma Ray v2.

### January 22, 2025
- **New feature** - Multi-turn agent conversation in flows.

### December 23, 2024
- **Model support** - Llama 3.3 70B Instruct for batch inference.

### December 19, 2024
- **New models** - Llama 3.3 70B Instruct and Stable Diffusion 3.5.

### December 9, 2024
- **New feature** - Guardrails for French and Spanish inputs.

### December 6, 2024
- **New feature** - Batch inference with inference profiles.

### December 4, 2024
- **Policy update** - Marketplace permissions in AmazonBedrockFullAccess and AmazonBedrockReadOnly.
- **New feature** - Bedrock Marketplace model deployment.
- **New feature** - Knowledge Bases: structured data stores and SQL query generation.
- **New feature** - Multimodal data parsing with images in Knowledge Bases.
- **New feature** - Image content filters in Guardrails.

### December 3, 2024
- **New feature** - Multi-agent collaboration for Agents.
- **New feature** - Model distillation (teacher to student model).

### December 2, 2024
- **New feature** - Latency optimized models from Meta and Anthropic.

### December 1, 2024
- **New feature** - Guardrails on Knowledge Base retrieval results.
- **New feature** - RetrieveAndGenerateStream (streaming version).
- **New feature** - Retrieval filters based on user query and metadata schema.
- **New feature** - Reranker models for source document relevance.
- **New feature** - Direct knowledge base document ingestion.
- **New feature** - Custom data source connectors.

### November 22, 2024
- **Region expansion** - Europe (Zurich) for Agents, Knowledge Bases, Prompt management, Flows.
- **Region expansion** - Flows in US East (Ohio), Asia Pacific (Seoul), Canada (Central), Europe (London), South America (Sao Paulo).
- **General release** - Amazon Bedrock Flows.

### November 21, 2024
- **Feature update** - Binary embeddings support for Knowledge Bases.

### November 20, 2024
- **Feature update** - Prompt optimization in Prompt management.

### November 11, 2024
- **Region expansion** - AWS GovCloud (US-East) and Europe (Zurich).

### November 8, 2024
- **Region expansion** - Knowledge Bases in US East (Ohio).

### November 7, 2024
- **New feature** - Flow trace viewing.
- **New feature** - Guardrails in Knowledge Base and prompt nodes.
- **General release** - Prompt management.

### November 6, 2024
- **Region expansion** - Application inference profiles in Asia Pacific (Singapore, Seoul).
- **Feature update** - Cross-region inference profiles for Anthropic Claude and Meta Llama.

### November 4, 2024
- **New model** - Anthropic Claude 3.5 Haiku.

### November 1, 2024
- **New feature** - Application inference profiles for cost/metric tracking.

### October 31, 2024
- **Feature update** - Model-specific inference parameters in Prompt management.

### October 22, 2024
- **New model** - You can now use Anthropic Claude 3.5 Sonnet v2 with Amazon Bedrock. You can also use computer use tools with Anthropic Claude 3.5 Sonnet v2.

### October 21, 2024
- **Policy update** - Custom Model Import read-only permissions added.
- **Feature update** - TopK field no longer supported in inferenceConfiguration.
- **Feature update** - Chat/text playground merged.

### October 7, 2024
- **Region expansion** - Batch inference in Asia Pacific (Seoul).

### October 1, 2024
- **Region expansion** - US East (Ohio) and Asia Pacific (Seoul).

### September 25, 2024
- **New models** - Meta Llama 3.2 (1B, 3B, 11B, 90B Instruct).
- **New feature** - Binary embeddings with Titan Text Embeddings V2.

### September 24, 2024
- **New feature** - CloudWatch Metrics for Guardrails monitoring.
- **New feature** - Model evaluation for inference profiles.

### September 23, 2024
- **New models** - AI21 Jamba 1.5 Large and Mini.
- **Feature update** - Inference profiles with Prompt management and flows.
- **Model support** - Provisioned Throughput for Claude 3.5 Sonnet in US West (Oregon).

### September 18, 2024
- **New feature** - EventBridge monitoring for batch inference jobs.

### September 16, 2024
- **New feature** - Cross-account S3 files for batch inference.
- **New feature** - VPC support for batch inference.

### September 11, 2024
- **Feature update** - Inference profiles with Knowledge Base generation and parsing.

### September 4, 2024
- **Documentation update** - Content reorganization for readability.
- **New models** - Stable Image Ultra, Stable Diffusion 3 Large, Stable Image Core.

### August 27, 2024
- **Policy update** - Inference profile read-only permissions added.
- **New feature** - Cross-region inference profiles.

### August 26, 2024
- **New feature** - User confirmation before Agent action group invocation.

### August 21, 2024
- **New feature** - Asynchronous model invocation with multiple prompts with batch inference is now generally available.

### August 16, 2024
- **New model** - Amazon Titan Image Generator G1 V2.

### August 6, 2024
- **Region expansion** - Meta Llama 3 in AWS GovCloud (US-West).

### August 1, 2024
- **New feature** - Copy custom models across regions.
- **New feature** - Share custom models with other accounts.

### July 24, 2024
- **New model** - Mistral Large 2 (24.07).

### July 23, 2024
- **New models** - Meta Llama 3.1 Instruct models.

### July 22, 2024
- **New feature** - Prompt management and Flows with Bedrock Studio.

### July 10, 2024
- **New features** - Prompt management, Amazon Bedrock Flows, agent memory, code interpretation, and contextual grounding checks now available.
- **New feature** - Runtime knowledge base query configuration modification.
- **New feature** - Semantic, hierarchical chunking, and advanced parsing.
- **New feature** - Query decomposition in Knowledge Bases.
- **New feature** - Data source connectors (Confluence, Salesforce, SharePoint, web URLs).
- **New feature** - Independent Guardrails API.

### June 28, 2024
- **Region expansion** - Agents in Canada (Central), Europe (London), South America (Sao Paulo).

### June 25, 2024
- **New model** - AI21 Jamba-Instruct.

### June 21, 2024
- **Region expansion** - Guardrails expansion.
- **New feature** - Document inclusion in chat playground.

### June 20, 2024
- **New model** - You can now use Claude 3.5 Sonnet with Amazon Bedrock.
- **Feature update** - Cohere Embed V3 int8 and binary support.

### June 18, 2024
- **New feature** - Guardrails with Converse API.
- **Region expansion** - Canada (Central), Europe (London), South America (Sao Paulo).

### June 13, 2024
- **New feature** - Trace information on Lambda handling in Agents.
- **New model** - Claude 3 Opus.

### June 7, 2024
- **New feature** - You can now use the Converse API to create conversational applications.

### May 30, 2024
- **New feature** - You can now use tools with Amazon Bedrock models.
- **Model support** - Amazon Titan Text Embeddings V2 for Knowledge Bases.

### May 24, 2024
- **New model** - Mistral Small.

### May 20, 2024
- **New feature** - Guardrails with Agents.

### May 9, 2024
- **New feature** - Modifiable inference parameters for Knowledge Base responses.

### May 7, 2024
- **New model** - Amazon Titan Text Premier.
- **New feature** - Bedrock Studio (Preview).

### May 2, 2024
- **New feature** - Provisioned Throughput with Agent alias.

### May 1, 2024
- **Region expansion** - Europe (Ireland) and Asia Pacific (Mumbai).
- **Feature update** - MongoDB Atlas vector index support.

### April 30, 2024
- **New model** - Titan Embeddings Text V2.
- **Model support** - Provisioned Throughput for AI21 Jurassic-2 Ultra.

### April 29, 2024
- **New models** - Cohere Command R and Command R+.

### April 23, 2024
- **New feature** - Custom model import.
- **New feature** - Agent return control before Lambda invocation.
- **New feature** - Action group definition by required parameters.
- **New feature** - Document chat (eRAG).
- **Feature update** - Multiple data sources in Knowledge Bases.
- **New feature** - Amazon Bedrock Guardrails to implement safeguards to block harmful content in model inputs and responses.

### April 16, 2024
- **New model** - Claude 3 Opus.

### April 9, 2024
- **Region expansion** - Asia Pacific (Sydney).

### April 5, 2024
- **New feature** - CloudFormation support for Agents and Knowledge Bases.

### April 4, 2024
- **Region expansion** - Europe (Paris).
- **Model support** - Claude 3 Haiku for Knowledge Base response generation.

### April 3, 2024
- **New model** - Mistral Large.

### March 29, 2024
- **New feature** - Provisioned Throughput with no commitment.
- **Model support** - Provisioned Throughput expansion (Claude 3 Sonnet, Haiku, Embed models).

### March 28, 2024
- **New feature** - VPC endpoint for OpenSearch Serverless access.

### March 27, 2024
- **New feature** - Document metadata and filtering in Knowledge Bases.

### March 26, 2024
- **Feature update** - Prompt templates for Knowledge Base customization.

### March 25, 2024
- **Model support** - Claude 3 Sonnet for Knowledge Base response generation.

### March 20, 2024
- **New feature** - Agent latency optimization.

### March 13, 2024
- **New model** - Claude 3 Haiku.

### March 4, 2024
- **New models** - Mistral AI models.

### March 1, 2024
- **New feature** - Customizable search strategy for Knowledge Bases.

### February 28, 2024
- **New feature** - Watermark detection in Titan Image Generator.

### February 14, 2024
- **New feature** - AWS PrivateLink for Agent Build-time service.

### February 9, 2024
- **Feature update** - IAM role flexibility for Knowledge Bases.

### February 2, 2024
- **Model status** - Stable Diffusion XL v0.8 in legacy status.

### January 25, 2024
- **Documentation update** - Code examples chapter added.

### January 24, 2024
- **Feature update** - Production/non-production options for OpenSearch Serverless.

### January 18, 2024
- **New feature** - Real-time trace viewing in Agent test window.

### January 17, 2024
- **Model support** - Cohere Embed models for Knowledge Base embedding.

### December 27, 2023
- **Model support** - Claude 2.1 for Agents and Knowledge Bases.

### December 21, 2023
- **Region expansion** - AWS GovCloud (US-West).
- **New feature** - Amazon Aurora vector store support.

### December 12, 2023
- **New policies** - AmazonBedrockFullAccess and AmazonBedrockReadOnly.

### November 29, 2023
- **New feature** - Model version monitoring and customization.
- **New models** - Titan Image Generator G1 V1, Titan Multimodal Embeddings G1.

### November 28, 2023
- **New feature** - Continued pre-training for custom models.
- **New feature** - Retrieve and RetrieveAndGenerate APIs for Knowledge Bases.
- **General release** - Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases.
- **General release** - Amazon Bedrock Agents.
- **Feature update** - Cohere and Meta model customization.

### November 13, 2023
- **Documentation localization** - Japanese and German translations available.

### October 20, 2023
- **Region expansion** - Europe (Frankfurt).

### October 3, 2023
- **Region expansion** - Asia Pacific (Tokyo).

### September 28, 2023
- **Gated general release** - Gated general release of the Amazon Bedrock service.
